description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a large array of photovoltaic panels mounted on a sloped platform. The panels are arranged in a grid formation and are elevated above a base structure that appears to be made of concrete or a similar material. The base includes several colored sections, possibly indicating access points, service areas, or electrical housings, and there are visible vent pipes and small structures on the platform. The solar panels are supported by a robust frame, likely metal, and are tilted at an angle to optimize sunlight capture. The installation is expansive, with the panels covering a significant portion of the base, and the overall design suggests a fixed, permanent setup. The surface of the panels is dark and glossy, while the base is a mix of light gray, yellow, and black, with some areas marked for technical or safety purposes.
description: A large, fixed solar panel array mounted on a sloped, multi-colored base with visible support structures and technical features. The panels are arranged in a grid and elevated above a robust platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full width of the solar panel array and the multi-colored base with technical markings and vent pipes.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the tilt of the solar panels and the depth of the supporting frame, with visible access structures on the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the length of the base, the underside of the panel array, and additional technical features on the platform.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, emphasizing the slope of the panels and the text indicating the tilt angle on the base.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 30-35 degrees, facing a single direction, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: roof-mounted on a concrete or composite platform with a visible metal frame support structure
attribute_array_configuration: multiple rows in a rectangular grid, approximately 3 rows by 6 columns
